subject: Happy low-diet celebration
body:
Happy happy salad day? Or maybe fruit day?
;-)

Wanted to wish U the best in the world!!! May the purity and peace is around U, but mainly with in U! 

I texted Sarah where to call U, but no response. Hope U R having wonderful time.

Just love
Lots of love, light and happiness,
Petra
